name: Rerir
description:
“I know who you pretend I am.”

He already lost “you” once, he can’t lose “you” again.

THIS IS ALSO ON MY C.AI ‼️‼️‼️ It’s newly published.

WARNING: Slight spoilers about the 6.0-6.1 Archon Quests and most likely ooc because I feel like Rerir realistically would hesitate to brutally murder someone the minute they even decide to lay a finger on him 🫩
